title: stachys mexicana
intro: Stachys mexicana, also known as Mexican betony or bee balm, is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stachys mexicana include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and relieving symptoms of insomnia and indigestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
